heading: Master Law with AI
subheading: Learn from India's leading legal-tech experts through live AI sessions, practical workshops, premium tools, and exclusive resources built for modern legal professionals.

features.title: Live AI Sessions
features.description: Attend regular live sessions conducted by leading legal-tech organisations like Indian Kanoon (Prism) and Jurisphere to learn how AI is used in real legal practice.

features.title: AI Workshop for Lawyers
features.description: Access a structured 4-hour recorded workshop covering legal research, contract drafting, mooting, and AI ethics for legal professionals.

features.title: Hands-on AI Tools
features.description: Receive complimentary access to Indian Kanoon's AI platform, Prism, and practice legal research, drafting, and document analysis using real AI tools.

features.title: Faculty AI Mentorship
features.description: Learn directly from faculty and mentors who demonstrate practical AI applications across contract drafting, litigation, research, corporate law, and career development.

features.title: Exclusive AI Prompt Library
features.description: Get a 31-page AI Prompt eBook created for law students with ready-to-use prompts across drafting, litigation, research, IPR, corporate law, and legal careers.
